headline: Oracle (ORCL) Partners With IMSA Labs To Launch Cloud And AI Studio
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has partnered with IMSA Labs as a founding partner to support real time technology development in motorsports. The company launched the Oracle Cloud Innovation Studio, a program for startups building AI and cloud solutions on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. Live racing environments are being used to test edge computing, AI, and distributed systems for potential use in sectors such as manufacturing, transportation, and logistics. For investors tracking Oracle, this...

headline: Oracle Just Hit a Fresh 52-Week Low and Had Its Credit Cut Toward Junk. Has the AI-Capex Panic Overshot?
summary: A fresh low and a credit cut tell one story about the cloud giant. Its $638 billion backlog tells another.

headline: Oracle Crashed 65% From Its Peak. I Just Bought It Anyway. Here's Why.
summary: Let's just say investors aren't convinced Oracle's aggressive spending plan will work out.
